MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Berenice Villa for Floyd K. Rollins II, Administrator (via Zoom).

Ms. Villa informed the court that the signed verification from the personal representative was recently received and can now be submitted. She requested a continuance to address the remaining notes from the Probate Examiner.

The court continued the matter to April 15, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.
